## basicFunctions variable

The A2UI 0.9 basic-catalog function implementations packaged as `CatalogFunctionEntry`<!-- -->s, ready to spread into `<A2UI catalogs={[...]}>`<!-- -->. The impls themselves come from `@a2ui/web_core` so we stay aligned with the upstream spec for free.

**Signature:**

```typescript
basicFunctions: readonly CatalogFunctionEntry[]
```

## Example

&lt;<!-- -->A2UI catalogs=<!-- -->{<!-- -->\[Text, Button, ...basicFunctions\]<!-- -->} ... /<!-- -->&gt;
